title: Somebody Told Me
meaning_summary: Its hook and early-2000s alternative identity help it remain commercially durable through replay and rediscovery.
revenue_drivers: Alternative playlists and nostalgia listening support repeat streaming.
Catalog familiarity keeps the track discoverable over time.
The band's broader catalog strength reinforces long-tail replay.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Somebody Told Me is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
